overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character ascending stairs and walking through a futuristic urban environment. The scene transitions from a covered stairwell through an underpass to an open city overlook with dense traffic and towering neon-lit skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stairwell with teal concrete walls

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs following other pedestrians upward through the stairwell

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing ascending stairs ahead of ego

entered.detail: wide staircase with gray steps and teal colored walls
bright orange safety railings along staircase
red sign with white Cyrillic text reading СОБЫТИЯ
teal colored concrete wall panels with horizontal lines

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person ascent up a wide concrete staircase with distinctive teal walls and bright orange handrails. A red sign with Cyrillic text is visible at the top. The environment is enclosed and artificially lit, with a few pedestrians ahead climbing the same stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with overhead pipes and benches

events.description: exits stairwell into covered walkway with industrial ceiling and fluorescent lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through covered underpass passing seated pedestrians on concrete benches

notable_agents.action: person sitting on bench against teal wall looking at device
person sitting on bench with distinctive blue glowing shoes

entered.detail: exposed concrete ceiling with large industrial pipes

segments.scene_description: Exiting the stairwell into a covered pedestrian underpass with industrial aesthetics. The ceiling features exposed concrete and pipes with fluorescent lighting. Concrete benches line the walls where pedestrians sit, and the teal wall panels from the stairwell remain visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with panoramic view of futuristic city skyline

events.description: exits covered underpass into open plaza with view of city skyline
transition from fluorescent artificial light to bright natural sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking across open plaza toward elevated overlook of city traffic and skyscrapers

entered.detail: large digital screens displaying advertisements on building facade
palm trees in planters along walkway edge
tall glass and steel towers with neon accents and futuristic architecture
busy road with multiple lanes of traffic below the overlook

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass into a sunlit open plaza with a dramatic view of a futuristic cityscape. Digital billboards and palm trees line the left side while towering glass skyscrapers rise in the distance. The scene transitions from artificial to natural lighting as the camera approaches an overlook of the busy multi-lane highway below.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway transitioning to stair descent

events.description: begins descending stairs from elevated position to street level
blue-haired pedestrian passes close to camera temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: descending stairs while observing traffic and cityscape below

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with blue hair and white shirt passing by on walkway

entered.detail: concrete stairs leading down to street level with orange accents
vertical neon signage on building facades including SABURO sign

segments.scene_description: Walking along the elevated overlook before beginning the descent to street level via concrete stairs. A pedestrian with distinctive blue hair passes by closely. The camera captures views of the busy traffic below and prominent neon building signage, including a large vertical SABURO sign, as the skyscrapers appear closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown sidewalk alongside multi-lane traffic

events.description: reaches street level and continues along sidewalk
passing by intersection with active vehicle traffic and traffic signals

agents.ego_description: walking along busy sidewalk passing pedestrians and observing street traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with orange hard hat walking toward camera
group of pedestrians walking along sidewalk

entered.detail: ground level shops with glowing neon signs and entrances

segments.scene_description: Having reached street level, the camera moves along a busy downtown sidewalk with moderate pedestrian traffic. Storefronts with neon signage line the right side while multi-lane traffic flows on the left. The scene includes an intersection with traffic lights and various pedestrians including a worker with an orange hard hat.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a confined, artificially lit stairwell into a vast, sun-drenched futuristic cityscape. It begins with an ascent up wide concrete stairs characterized by teal walls and bright orange handrails, passing a red Cyrillic sign at the top. As the camera exits the stairwell, the environment shifts into a covered industrial underpass filled with exposed pipes, fluorescent lighting, and concrete benches. The scene then opens abruptly as the camera emerges from the shadows into a bright plaza lined with digital billboards and palm trees. Finally, the lighting transitions from artificial glow to natural sunlight as the view expands toward towering glass skyscrapers and a busy multi-lane highway below.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated urban overlook down into the dense, neon-lit bustle of a futuristic street level. It begins by gliding along a high walkway, passing a blue-haired pedestrian while capturing views of heavy traffic and a towering vertical SABURO sign among the skyscrapers. As the camera descends a set of concrete stairs, the perspective shifts from the airy height of the overlook to the enclosed energy of the city floor. The scene then opens onto a busy downtown sidewalk, moving past neon-lit storefronts and an intersection where pedestrians, including a worker in an orange hard hat, navigate the flow of multi-lane traffic.
